$comment: Loupe ticket data model. Each field tagged with `source` (jira | loupe) and `tier` (L1 = on card, L2 = in detail view, L3 = deeper / search only). The `acceptanceCriteria` JIRA field is the highest-signal piece of agent context — Loupe prefers it over description prose when building the dispatch brief.

project.notes: project key — Loupe uses it for repo binding

description.notes: Atlassian Document Format. Rendered in detail view; excerpted on card.

priority.notes: Mapped to P1–P5 in Loupe UI

status.notes: To Do | In Progress | In Review | Done | etc.

assignee.notes: If not the current user, ticket does not appear in Loupe inbox

labels.notes: Includes `loupe:auto` if user has opted ticket into auto-dispatch

components.notes: Often used by Loupe to infer repo binding

links.notes: blocks, is blocked by, relates to, duplicates

comments.notes: Last 2–3 inline in detail view; full thread on expand

acceptanceCriteria.notes: Highest-signal field for agent context. Loupe prefers this over description prose in the dispatch brief.

loupe_triage.$comment: Output of cheap pre-processing on every ticket. ~$0.001/ticket on a Haiku-class model. Re-runs when ticket content changes.

riskAreas.notes: Standardized vocabulary: payments, auth, security, migration, ml-quality, concurrency, data-loss, performance, infra, observability

constraints.notes: Extracted from description / comments / acceptance criteria. Rendered as Slack-style mono tags on the card.

missingInfo.notes: When non-null, replaces the suggestedAction chip with a 'Needs:' indicator.

duplicateOf.notes: Tickets / PRs with high semantic similarity to this one

repoBinding.notes: Inferred from project / components if not configured

secondOpinionRecommended.notes: True when scope=open-ended OR risk includes payments/auth/security

triageModel.notes: Model used for this triage run, for replayability

loupe_state.$comment: Loupe's own state machine layer over the JIRA ticket.

dispatchHistory.notes: Previous attempts to fix this ticket — visible in detail view

sentToHuman.notes: True when user picked 'Send to me' — mutes from Loupe inbox, ticket stays in JIRA

examples.$comment: PAY-1284 · Senior-eng grade payments bug. High risk, hard deadline, explicit constraints.

jira.summary: Fix race in Stripe webhook handler
jira.description: Intermittent duplicate Stripe charges under high load. Two webhook deliveries for the same event_id arrive concurrently and both pass the 'already processed?' check before either writes the marker. Need a safe concurrency fix.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: Concurrent dupes eliminated. Serial-retry behaviour for Stripe redeliveries unchanged.

examples.$comment: BILL-308 · Routine task, well-scoped, single technical constraint.

jira.description: Standard healthcheck. Returns DB connectivity, queue depth, Stripe API ping.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint returns 200 OK with JSON body listing each dependency check. P95 under 200ms.

examples.$comment: SEC-22 · Auth/security work, mid-priority, two non-obvious constraints.

jira.description: Mitigate scripted account creation. Per-IP token bucket; reject after threshold. Don't reveal the threshold value in error responses or headers.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: Signup throttled at N req/min/IP. Excess returns generic 429 with no rate-limit headers leaked.

examples.$comment: INFRA-1011 · Trivial dep bump. Plan-and-dispatch still recommended because infra changes warrant a glance.

jira.description: Provider 1.8 unlocks drift detection fixes. Low-risk; needs lockfile update and plan output attached to the PR.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: terraform plan output clean; no resource changes.

examples.$comment: SEARCH-44 · Open-ended ML/perf story. Multiple constraints. Highest-cost ticket.

jira.summary: Implement learned re-ranking on product search
jira.description: Add a learned re-ranker on top of existing BM25 retrieval. Train on the click logs in search_events. Improve NDCG@10. Maintain current p95 latency. Don't introduce a new service in v1.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: NDCG@10 improves ≥5% on held-out set. P95 latency stays under 250ms.

examples.$comment: DATA-71 · Bug with missing info. Loupe blocks the suggest chip and surfaces what's needed.

jira.summary: Ingest pipeline drops records on transient S3 errors
jira.description: Some records are lost when S3 returns 5xx. Need retry with backoff.

missingInfo: affected record count or error log excerpt

examples.$comment: OBSERV-205 · Routine refactor, auth-touching so plan-and-dispatch recommended.

jira.summary: Add structured logging to auth-svc middleware
jira.description: Replace ad-hoc logger.info calls with structured JSON logs. Standard fields: trace_id, user_id (when present), latency_ms. Preserve existing log message text.
jira.acceptanceCriteria: All log lines in middleware emit structured JSON. No plaintext logs remain.
